# Lookn

> Lookn is a wellness companion app for iOS and Android — self-care made fun. A fluffy pocket pal (koko) helps you track moods, keep a journal, and build gentle daily streaks. Free, with no ads.

## What Lookn is

Lookn is a mobile wellness app featuring:

- **Mood tracking** — log how you're feeling in a few taps.
- **Journaling** — private daily entries; your words stay yours.
- **Streaks & habits** — gentle daily check-ins to build a self-care routine.
- **Adventures** — short, themed wellness journeys (e.g. sleep, anxiety, gratitude).
- **Breathing exercises** — guided patterns with calming visuals.
- **A koko companion** — a friendly mascot that grows alongside your practice.

## Platforms

- iOS App Store
- Google Play (Android)

## Pricing

Free. The core app costs nothing. Some optional features are available as in-app purchases. There are no ads, ever.

## Privacy commitments

- Lookn does not sell personal data.
- Lookn does not show ads.
- Lookn does not train AI models on your journal contents.
- Data is encrypted in transit and at rest (AWS).
- Account deletion is a two-tap action from inside the app, or by emailing support.

Full policy: https://looknapp.com/privacy.html

## Support

- Email: support@looknapp.com
- Support page: https://looknapp.com/support.html

## Key pages

- Home: https://looknapp.com/
- Privacy: https://looknapp.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://looknapp.com/terms.html
- Support: https://looknapp.com/support.html

## FAQ

**Q: What is Lookn?**
A: A wellness companion app for tracking moods, journaling, building streaks, and looking after yourself. Free on iOS and Android.

**Q: Is Lookn free?**
A: Yes. The core app is free. Some optional features are in-app purchases. No ads.

**Q: Does Lookn sell my data?**
A: No. Lookn does not sell personal data, does not show ads, and does not train AI models on your journal contents.

**Q: What platforms does Lookn run on?**
A: iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play).

**Q: How do I delete my account?**
A: Settings → Account → Delete Account in-app, or email support@looknapp.com. Deletion is permanent and completes within 30 days.
